pi_items.source: Task instruction explicitly requests saving as "SegmentFunnel". .dva is the Oracle Analytics Desktop extension.
Standard Windows user document path for the "Docker" user and matches task instruction.
Task instruction explicitly requests setting title to "Revenue by Customer Segment".
Task instruction requires creating a "Funnel" chart.
Task instruction requires mapping "Customer Segment", matching the dataset column "Customer Segment".
Task instruction requires mapping "Sales", matching the dataset column "Sales".
Programmatic heuristic size bound for valid DVA (Oracle Analytics zipped metadata format) files.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an Oracle Analytics Desktop (.dva) workbook containing a funnel chart of Sales mapped by Customer Segment, saved as SegmentFunnel.dva in the user's Documents folder. The title must be 'Revenue by Customer Segment', and all mapped dimensions and measures are correctly aligned with columns present in the synthetic dataset 'sample_order_lines2023.xlsx'.
